publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-06-02 18:05:46 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture. Director of Research

did.abstract: Collection of correspondence, reports, research studies and committee reports for the Directors of Research, Department of Agriculture, primarily focused on the late 1950s to late 1960s with a small amount of documents from 1905 and the mid-1930s.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection of correspondence, reports, research studies and committee reports for the Directors of Research, Department of Agriculture, primarily focused on the late 1950s to late 1960s with a small amount of documents from 1905 and the mid-1930s.

emph.ref: Series I. Departmental Programs and Areas of Interest
Series V. Progress Reports and Research Reviews
Series VI. Department Committees and Reports

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Director of Research files, #21-12-1074. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Departmental Programs and Areas of Interest
L.H. Bailey Hortorium Advisory Committee Minutes #38
Distribution of extension bulletins (Director W. K. Kennedy)
New York State Cooperative Extension: "Organizing for Program Implementation"
Annual reports - Training Trainers in Comparative Extension Education
Reports - Cornell Center for International Studies
International Agricultural Development - Director K.L. Turk
Experiment Station Committee on Organization and Policy (ESCOP) (1-2)
Meeting in Lincoln, Nebraska, ESCOP subcommittee on marketing
Dedication of the Hudson Valley Research Lab, Poughkeepsie, NY.
Luncheon for Dr. George Mehren, Assistant Secretary of Agriculture
New York State Soil Conservation Committee
Northeastern Agricultural Experiment Station directors summer meeting, Amherst, MA.
Northeaster directors fall meeting, Washington, DC.
Spring meeting of the Northeastern Directors' Association
TAP meeting to discuss north country drainage proposal
SPICE State Poultry Industry Cooperative Effort
W.K. Kennedy: State Irrigation Research and Extension Project preliminary report
Visit of Mr. Elwin W. Stevens, Assistant Vice President of Architecture and Planning, SUNY.
Temporary State Commission on Water Resource Planning, conference report.
Annual CSRS review, Cornell Experiment Station
Annual CSRS review, Cornell Experiment Station
Annual CSRS review, Cornell Experiment Station
Annual CSRS review, Cornell Experiment Station
Review of agriculture engineering research by the SESD
USDA - SESD summary of current program and recs for future programs and facilities

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Original files in loose alpha order, labelled "A, B, C, etc., with other files sometimes interspersed.

did.unittitle: Correspondence on Greenhouse and Growth Chamber

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes corresp and reprints about Rachel Carson's "Silent Spring" and ensuing controversy.

did.unittitle: Steward, F. C. - Director: Laboratory for Cell Physiology, Growth and Development

US Soil, Plant and Nutrition Laboratory dedication

Expanding basic research in bio sciences
A Social Analysis of South Old Town, Long Island
